mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO object_outbox ( event_type, event_key, payload_json, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{eventType}, #{eventKey}, #{payloadJson}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type AS eventType, event_key AS eventKey, payload_json AS payloadJson, status, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_at AS nextRetryAt, last_error AS lastError, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM object_outbox WHERE status = 'pending' AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE object_outbox SET status = 'pending', retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
